comment: 50yo male outdoor construction worker (general contractor + road crew), 25 years cumulative daily outdoor exposure in temperate-to-southern UA latitudes (intermittent equatorial deployments earlier career), Fitzpatrick type II skin, history of multiple sunburns. No current cutaneous malignancy. Engine routes to PreventionPlan recommending photoprotection counseling (broad-spectrum sunscreen + clothing + hat) + annual clinical skin exam + patient skin self-exam education + vitamin D balance. Validates v0.3 RF-ENVIRONMENTAL-OUTDOOR-UV-SKIN-PREVENTION pilot (BCC/SCC/melanoma risk).
